media.title: Media Downloader
media.description: Download songs or playlists from YouTube and Spotify automatically.
media.placeholder: Paste the YouTube or Spotify link here...
media.empty_recent: There are no recent downloads yet.
media.unsupported_url: Unrecognized link. YouTube and Spotify are supported.
media.download_started: Download started! Check "Recent Downloads" in a few seconds.
media.download_timeout: The download did not finish in time. Check the agent window and Recent Downloads.

pdf.title: Image to PDF
pdf.description: Turn your photos (JPG, PNG, HEIC) into a professional PDF document in seconds.
pdf.upload_desc: Supports JPG, PNG, WEBP and HEIC (iPhone)
pdf.no_images: No images have been selected yet.

transcriber.title: Audio to Text
transcriber.description: Turn voice recordings into editable text using AI.
transcriber.upload_prompt: Upload or drag your audio files
transcriber.placeholder_result: Transcription requires an AI model in the Agent. For now, this is a placeholder. A future version will integrate local Whisper.

modal.title: TorkTool Pro Agent
modal.description: The Local Agent lets you process music downloads and heavy files on your computer.
modal.step3: The web app will connect automatically.

overlay.title: Drop to add
overlay.description: Your files will be processed automatically
